overview: Premium multi-page marketing website for Shree Anant Residency, a girls hostel in Kota, Rajasthan. Features cinematic hero slider, smooth animations, and a luxury hotel aesthetic targeting IIT-JEE and NEET students.
features: Cinematic hero slider with Ken Burns zoom and text animations
Fixed sticky navbar with smooth page navigation
Animated facilities grid with hover effects
About, Facilities, Services, Blog, and Contact pages
Parallax scroll effects and AOS animations
Premium color palette: White, Beige, Soft Gold, Light Brown
